note: Canonical schema for final_status.json. Built mechanically from dual_proof_manifest.json via proof_dimensions — never from in-memory pipeline state or top-level legacy fields. proof_dimensions is the SINGLE source of truth.

framework_status.rule: COMPLETE iff all three proof_dimensions verdicts=ACCEPT AND n_empty=0 AND n_inconsistencies=0

proof_dimensions.note: The ONLY canonical source for dimension verdicts. Top-level flat fields are kept for backward compatibility but MUST NOT be used as source of truth.

legacy_fields.synthetic_verdict: Kept for backward compatibility. Canonical source: proof_dimensions.synthetic.global_verdict
legacy_fields.real_data_verdict: Kept for backward compatibility. Canonical source: proof_dimensions.real_data_fred.global_verdict
legacy_fields.validation_verdict: Kept for backward compatibility. Canonical source: proof_dimensions.real_data_validation_protocol.verdict

integrity_rules: If framework_status=COMPLETE, dual_proof_status MUST be DUAL_PROOF_COMPLETE
read_proof_dimensions() MUST raise FinalGateError on missing dimensions or None verdicts
Old schemas without proof_dimensions MUST be reconstructed from flat fields or raise FinalGateError
